libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest/native-image runtime execution of io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 on JDK 25, configure runtime system properties: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful tests should create a local Vertx instance plus local HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 and exercise WebClient requests/responses, JSON bodies, forms/multipart, redirects, cookies/session, and caching without relying on external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact contains OAuth2WebClient, but vertx-auth-oauth2 is an optional dependency; only add io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2:5.0.1 if the generated tests deliberately target OAuth2WebClient APIs.
Tests must close WebClient, HttpServer, AsyncFile, and Vertx instances to avoid async resource leaks and native-test hangs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful vertx-web-client coverage; tests can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server. Native runs for Vert.x 5.0.1 still need the same Netty Java 25 unsafe-access runtime properties already used for 5.0.0.
